# shared/models.py
from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class OrderItem:
    product_id: int
    quantity: int
    price: float


@dataclass
class Order:
    id: int
    user_id: int
    items: list
    total: float


# orders/module.py
from shared.models import Order, OrderItem


def create_order(user_id: int, items: list, total: float) -> Order:
    return Order(id=generate_id(), user_id=user_id, items=items, total=total)


# payments/service.py
from shared.models import Order


def process_payment(order: Order):
    charge(order.user_id, order.total)


# inventory/check.py
from shared.models import OrderItem


def validate_stock(items: list[OrderItem]):
    for item in items:
        product = get_product(item.product_id)
        if product.stock < item.quantity:
            raise ValueError(f"Insufficient stock for {item.product_id}")
